ObtainInformationOnPurchasableDisks.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
ObtainInformationOnPurchasableDisks.zoneName: Zone information. The zoneName naming convention is "country-region-zone-sequence" in lowercase, e.g., Beijing Zone A is "cn-bj-a". If zoneName is empty or invalid, purchasable disk information for all availability zones will be returned.
